package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormSessionAllocatedPerItem() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_session_allocated_per_item"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM Session(...) chains allocated inside loops before issuing queries."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
